name: sprintpulse-ai
description: SprintPulse AI delivery intelligence app for Semicolon 2026.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w packages/mcp-server
